description: Single source of truth for bus anomaly-detection parameters. BOTH the Flink speed layer (backend/streams) AND the ClickHouse batch publish script (frontend/scripts/publish-clickhouse-bus-analytics.mjs) read these values so the two engines cannot drift. See docs/architecture/shared-detection-rules.md and docs/architecture/anomaly-detection-algorithm.md. Do NOT hardcode these numbers anywhere else.

parameterDocs.routeMinutes: Full-route traversal time in minutes. headway_min_est = progress_gap_ratio * routeMinutes. Shared constant until per-route traversal time exists. (algorithm doc §3b, §5)
parameterDocs.serviceGapMinutes: Service-gap (空窗) headway threshold in minutes. Flink emits suspected_gap when headway_min_est >= this; batch emits route_bunching_signal rows when estimated_headway_minutes >= this. Mirrors the batch --min-headway-minutes default. (algorithm doc K(cp,t) starting value)
parameterDocs.bunchingProgressGapRatio: Bunching (群聚) closeness EPS on route_progress_ratio [0,1]. Adjacent vehicle pairs with progress_gap <= this are bunching candidates. (algorithm doc §5 EPS)
parameterDocs.bunchingConfirmationSlots: M consecutive slots a candidate pair must stay close before a bunching signal fires (kills GPS jitter). Speed layer only; batch reports per-slot candidates. (algorithm doc §3b, §5 M)
parameterDocs.maxDistanceToRouteMeters: Map-matching gate: observations farther than this from the route shape are dropped before detection. Flink filters in RouteGeometryIndex.enrich; batch filters distance_to_route_meters <= this. (algorithm doc §2)
